message:
test(perf): gracefully skip bundle size check when Chromium unavailable

Add browser environment detection to handle CI/test environments where
Puppeteer/Chromium is not available. Instead of failing the test, we
now detect browser-related errors and skip gracefully with a log message.

This prevents false failures in environments that don't have headless
Chrome configured while still enforcing bundle budgets where Chromium
is available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
